top_signals.title: Keir Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
top_signals.summary: Planned rise now not due to take place until end of year

top_signals.title: Curve swings to £9m loss as Lloyds takeover remains incomplete
top_signals.summary: Curve has swung to a loss as the Apple Pay rival’s future faces uncertainty ahead of its takeover by Lloyds Banking Group. The digital wallet provider suffered a £9.5m loss in the 2024 financial year, a major drawback from its £3m profit the 12 months prior. The tide turned on Curve’s balance sheet as revenue [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
